raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green sponge lies on a table, with a silver can (Red Bull) positioned to its left. The can is cylindrical and metallic, while the sponge is rectangular and textured. The task is to move the can closer to the sponge. **STRATEGY -** First, reach for the can, grasp it, then transport it horizontally to the right until it is adjacent to the sponge. This requires precise spatial control to avoid dropping the can. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach for the can’s body to establish contact. Step 2: Grasp the can’s side (for stability) to lift it. Step 3: Transport the can horizontally to the right, maintaining a safe height above the table. Step 4: Place the can near the sponge, ensuring it rests on the table surface.

Goal: on(red_bull_can, table); distance(red_bull_can, sponge, <, 0.15)
Scene: red_bull_can, sponge, table
Step 1: reach(red_bull_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the red bull can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_bull_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_bull_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_bull_can)
  affordance_region: the side of the red bull can
  contact: holding(red_bull_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_bull_can)
Step 3: transport(red_bull_can -> right)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table to the right of the sponge
  spatial: above(red_bull_can, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_bull_can)
  done_when: distance(red_bull_can, sponge) < 0.15
Step 4: place(red_bull_can -> table)
  affordance_region: the table surface near the sponge
  contact: surface_contact(red_bull_can, table) [completion]; released(red_bull_can) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_bull_can) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_bull_can, table) AND released(red_bull_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red bull can
the side of the red bull can
an empty area on the table to the right of the sponge
the table surface near the sponge
